/chat_channel_types/help.m: 有没有办法查看公会试炼中战斗首领的属性？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Is there a way to see the stats for the combat bosses in guild trials?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 悬停在它们上面？或者长按
/chat_channel_types/help.o: hover over them? or long press

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 点击方块以打开它，然后将鼠标指针悬停在怪物上
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Die Kachel anklicken, damit sie sich öffnet, dann den Mauszeicher über den Mob halten

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的，我更多是指所有它们的列表，因为你只能看到你的公会可用的那两个。在提前规划
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Yeah I meant more as in a list of all of them, as you can only see the two available to your guild. Trying to plan ahead

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 新手护符有什么用？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: What are Trainee Charms for?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 它们在测试服务器上每天都会变化，所以你可以去那里试试并检查全部5个。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: they change each day on the test server so u can try and check all 5 over there

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @IronNonnally 强化其他符咒或 1% 额外经验和专注
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @IronNonnally enhancing other charms or 1% bonus exp and focus

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @IronNonnally 他们分配经验
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @IronNonnally They allocate exp

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 收到，谢谢。 o/
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Roger, ty. o/

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 没有护身符时，你的战斗经验会在武器类型和所有主技能之间分配
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Without a charm your exp in combat is split between your weapon type and all on primary skills

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 有了一个魅力，70%的经验被引导到该魅力类型上
/chat_channel_types/help.o: With a chsrm that 70% exp gets funneled to the charm type

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我明白啦。好的。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: I seeee. Okay.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 嗯好的谢谢我会去看看测试服务器
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Ahh ok thanks I’ll check out the test server

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 公会祭坛是个人拥有还是公会共享的？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: are the guild shrines individual or shared between the guild?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @Biridian 公会正在购买一个祭坛，这让你可以个人解锁购买这个祭坛
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @Biridian la guilde achète un autel ce qui permet de débloquer l'achat de cet autel personellement

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 神龛建筑（这解锁个人神龛）是公会的，神龛商店里的是个人的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: the shrine building (this unlocks individual shrines) is guild, the one in the shrine shop is individual

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 例如，我解锁了力量祭坛，我所有的公会成员都可以在他们的公会“商店”标签中获得力量祭坛
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Par exemple j'ai débloque l'autel de force, tout mes membres ont la possibilité d'obtenir l'autel de force dans leur onglet "shop" de guilde

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 谢谢你们俩
/chat_channel_types/help.o: thank you both

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 乐意效劳
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Avec plaisir

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 迷宫中的强化技能失败时，进度会倒退-1而不是停留在当前等级，这是已知的bug吗？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Is it a known bug in labyrinth where on failure of the enhancing skill the progress goes back -1 instead of remaining at current level?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 如果你失败了，就会回到零，就像普通的强化尝试一样
/chat_channel_types/help.o: if ye fail it goes back to zero just like normal enhancing attempts

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以你需要在连续尝试中完成成就
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so ye need to do the achievement in consecutive attempts

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 哦哦哦我明白了。非常感谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: ohhhh I see. tyvm

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 这通常在实验室里更容易，以便更快速地连续尝试，取决于你的等级
/chat_channel_types/help.o: it's usually easier in lab for quicker consecutive attempts, depending on yer level

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 了解
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Good to know

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @WeeMilk 是吗？是不是在某个时候被改了，表现得像个保护失败，因为强化异常困难？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @WeeMilk Does it? Was it not changed at some point to act like a prot fail because enhancing was unusually hard?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 啊不，我把那个和把目标固定到+5搞混了，原因一样
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Ah no I mixed that up with fixing the target to +5 for the same reason

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 不，他们限制为5/5
/chat_channel_types/help.o: no, they limited it to 5/5

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 之前在更高的楼层它可以到6/6...甚至可能更远（我加入的最高房间是6/6的房间）
/chat_channel_types/help.o: before on higher floors it could go 6/6... maybe even further (the highest rooms I was joining were 6/6 rooms)

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 与此同时成功率在下降
/chat_channel_types/help.o: meanwhile the success rate was decreasing

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 这让完成房间变得超级困难
/chat_channel_types/help.o: which made it super difficult to complete the rooms

/chat_channel_types/help.m: {{0}}{{1}} 强化对我来说还是先弄坏一个房间再干别的，所以高级别时还是不怎么样。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: {{0}}{{1}} Enhancing still craps out a room before everything else for me, so it's still not great at higher levels.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: *比我低一层，抱歉
/chat_channel_types/help.o: *A floor before, mb

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我以前玩的时候从没达到那么高，但知道了谢谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: never got that high when i played before, but good to know ty

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的，强化仍然一直是我最低的房间，但在那之前真的很糟糕
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Yeah enhancing is still always my lowest room but it was really awful before that fix

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我的强化比其他技能低7级
/chat_channel_types/help.o: I have enhancing 7 levels lower than other skills

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 强化是我第三低的技能
/chat_channel_types/help.o: enhancing is my 3rd lowest skill

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 计算战斗等级时，是只取最高等级中的1个还是全部加起来？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: when calculating the comabt level does it jsut take 1 of the highest levels or all of it added in ()

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 如果它是一个MAX函数，它会取最高的值
/chat_channel_types/help.o: if its a MAX function it takes the highest

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 你可以在游戏指南中找到确切公式。不仅仅是所有等级。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: You can find the exact formula in the game guide. It's not just all levels

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @Mcamarket 游戏指南 > 战斗 > 滚动到最底部
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @Mcamarket Game guide > combat > scroll to the very bottom

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 0.1 * (体力 + 智力 + 攻击 + 防御 + MAX(近战, 远程, 魔法)) + 0.5 * MAX(攻击, 防御, 近战, 远程, 魔法
/chat_channel_types/help.o: 0.1 * (Stamina + Intelligence + Attack + Defense + MAX(Melee, Ranged, Magic)) + 0.5 * MAX(Attack, Defense, Melee, Ranged, Magic

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 那么，上面写着 MAX 时，是从队伍中取一个最高等级的吗？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so where it says MAX it takes 1 of the highest level in the group?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 它只取最高的1个是
/chat_channel_types/help.o: It takes the only 1 highest yes

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 它取选项中最高的那个，是的。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: It takes the highest one of the options, yeah.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: ok
20, 27, 20, 22, 8, 1, 32 and my combat level is 28

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 那是怎么计算的？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so how is that calculated?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 嘿 gpt 帮我算下 ^
/chat_channel_types/help.o: hey gpt calculate ^ for me

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 对于两个MAX()部分，替换你最高技能和魔法，所以32。然后计算
/chat_channel_types/help.o: For both of the MAX() sections substitute your highest skill, magic, so 32. Then do the math

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 有疑问时，游戏指南里都有战斗说明
/chat_channel_types/help.o: when in doubt, its in the game guide for combat

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 哦，是的，我现在看到了，谢谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: oh yeah, i see it now thanks

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 那不对，但我确实看到了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: that's not right but i did see it

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我差一点。就这样，谢谢
/chat_channel_types/help.o: i was close. that's it ty

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 基本上，一半是你的最高伤害技能，另一半是所有技能的平均值，不包括另外两个伤害技能。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Basically, half is your highest damage skill, and half is the average of all of them, excluding those other two damage skills.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的，我们到了，谢谢。:)
/chat_channel_types/help.o: yeah, we got there, thanks. :)

/chat_channel_types/help.o: oh yeah lol.

/chat_channel_types/help.o: I just fixed the grouping and the operation. I didn't notice the extra 20. also CL is not approximately equal, the decimal does matter

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 但我们的讨论不是关于那个的。有人问它是如何计算的，我用我的数字作为例子，这样我们就可以算出来，我们确实算出来了。谢谢帮助过的人。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: but our discussion wasn't about that. some1 asked how it was calculated and i used my numbers as an example so we could work it out, which we did. thanks to ppl who helped

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我很想去卖掉我所有的库存，然后用我能买得起的最好装备去搞全战斗农场，但随后我提醒自己，我喜欢做所有事情，管理任务、实验室等等

👪【公会大家庭】
🎉 Fish / Biu / BiuBiu / BiuBiuBiu 这四个工会是一个大家庭，阶下囚工会：WAKAKA 📌 QQ群：856720516，微信群请联系会长加入~

🚫【群规守则】
🔞 禁止内容:1)黄赌毒/暴力等违法内容;2)广告/诈骗/恶意链接;3)谣言/虚假信息;
🤝 文明交流：尊重他人，禁止人身攻击；理性讨论，拒绝恶意贬低

🔒 温馨提示：公告内容请勿外传，闷声发大财~

🎁【公会福利】
💰 新人基金：3000K（游戏规则内礼物）
🎯 750级奖励：6000K大礼包
⚔️ 强化装备优惠

🌟 【公会荣耀榜】 🏆
🧙‍♂️ 战斗榜-魔法
steam火法榜：Bestcow、Goodknight
